title: Oars and Moria’s Nightmare

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's doing it! He's really doing it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey!! What's with that group of people!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We've got to get down there, fast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Save our ray of Hope's comrades!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
